subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-11-24 in Abu Sinan
subcodes.first_line: If the Covenant-breakers had not frustrated my efforts, I would have assembled some of the Muslim and Christian chiefs
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر ناقضین گذاشته بودند من بعضی از روسای اسلام و مسیحی راجمع میکردم
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @oneness; unity of religion, @holy war [jihad]; violence in the name of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
